name: Best Vendasta Alternative: Switch & Save 20%
hero_main_title: An agency operating system that helps you resell new products/services and generate high-quality leads
hero_summary: Stop overpaying Vendasta for basic white-labeling & patchwork tools. Synup gives you a superior white-labeled marketing solutions to grow your business. Pair it with our smart client management suite that helps you find and close leads faster. ✅CRM ✅Sales Management ✅Invoicing and Payments ✅Reputation Management ✅Social Media Tool
counter_text_1: Agencies powered by Synup's agency operating system
counter_text_2: Average savings when switching from Vendasta
counter_text_3: Less client churn with predictive analytics & client health metrics
section_2_heading: Why Agencies Choose Synup Over Vendasta
section_2_summary: Vendasta is primarily a marketplace. This means there’s little involvement and support on the tools you end up buying. Synup has built a proprietery platform that really cares about what you do with our distinct solutions. We train your team, help you find relevant leads, do better prospecting, and ultimately become a partner in your growth. Why even settle for less? Choose the best vendasta alternative!
section_2_slider_1_summary: Vendasta has more of modular marketplace for services and tools. Synup is not just a CRM software, our strength is consolidating many agency-needs under one roof. From leads, CRM, proposals, payments, & projects to digital marketing tools, you can manage everything from one place.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Vendasta also has digital marketing tools, but Synup OS helps you own the experience fully down to the client level. Agencies can offer multiple marketing solutions to their clients including listings, reputation, social media, local SEO, and more.a
section_2_step_3_summary: Vendasta offers white labeling, but Synup ensures branding down to domain, notifications, portal, client apps, and navigation. It’s more comprehensive & you can customize the client app however you like.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Less manual work, more consistent output. AI agents for social media, content updates, client data management, review responses, and more. Clients get smarter insights and faster actions, while Synup OS frees up agency capacity.
section_3_heading: Synup vs Vendasta for Agencies: Feature Comparison
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO HELP AGENCIES GROW & REDUCE CLIENT CHURN
why_choose_tab_desc_1: Unlike Vendasta's piecemeal approach, Synup offers a comprehensive suite of business apps for local listing management, reputation management, and social media marketing – all at one competitive price.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Agencies get proactive alerts and signals when a client might be slipping; they can act ahead to retain; better client success metrics.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Our prospecting tool helps you find qualified SMB leads to grow your marketing agency. Filter them by using 100+ data points to get your pick. Our sales management solutions will help keep your pipeline filled.
why_choose_content_summary: Run your agency from a single OS: sales, onboarding, emaill campaigns, project management, billing, and reporting. No more juggling 10+ tools. Seamless Integration.
testimonial_summary: Elevate your client experience with a fully branded portal, custom domain, and white-label dashboards & reports. Resell full marketing product suites under your branding, unlocking recurring revenue without development costs.
customer_review_1_name: Kristen Dillon - VP of Operations, Zoek
customer_review_1_summary: What set Synup apart from all other places we looked is their dedication to their customers and their clients. It feels like a relationship, they’re really there to help you.
customer_review_2_summary: Most businesses don’t realize this, but getting these little things right is a leg up against the competition. The Synup platform gives us the ability to hone our attention to detail, helping our clients perform against the competition.
